title: drop step (i got that)
description: Lyrics from drop step (i got that)
body:
i don’t drop songs, i drop verses
never had a drop top, i drive versas
gotta decent drop step, i drive versus
anyone with a rep, i drop buckets
you wanna step, i’m like fuck it i love it
let’s see what the rock do
if i did it i done it, when you got it like that
can’t nobody stop you
shoot ya shot, use the moves you got
so nobody block you
pullup hesi jimbo real ballers know where i got that
drop back, pull up from the corner at half court cuz i got that
